entry.name: 댓글 소통
covered_facts: the Figma comment label is projected as task-thread messages
cold thread collection is fetched before following an advertised active stream
daemon progress is batched and projected through typed stream events
stop is a SaaS command consumed later by daemon polling

direction_loop.top_down: A new thread state, message kind, or stop semantic changes the API DSL and stream event contract first.
direction_loop.bottom_up: A daemon batching or client stream-cost finding updates daemon/control-plane evidence, then contracts if thread meaning changes.
